displayTitle: X-Wing Rogue Squadron #32: Mandatory Retirement, Part 1
synopsis: When Imperial Intelligence chief Ysanne Isard discovers that acting-Emperor Pestage has made a deal with the Rebel Alliance, it appears that the Rebels' ticket to Imperial Center has been punched. But a Rebel operative witnesses Pestage's capture, and Rogue Squadron is assigned to go after him.
title: X-Wing Rogue Squadron #32: Mandatory Retirement, Part 1
